rewards.title: Ecosystem
rewards.intro: Campaigns, rewards, and Bags links are aggregated here. Use your connected EVM wallet for shopping and checkout; more features will ship iteratively.
rewards.walletExplainer: Shopping-only users only need an EVM wallet. If you join on-chain activities on Bags, you will connect a Solana wallet on bags.fm and approve prompts there—it is separate from the EVM login and cannot replace it. Skip Solana if you skip these activities.
rewards.plannedHint: Task claims and reward summaries are on the roadmap; keep contributing via DAO and community programs—we will surface benefits here when ready.
rewards.heroSubtitle: Official campaigns, Bags partnerships, and community rewards—earn contribution points, limited NFTs, and platform perks.
rewards.walletNoticeLine1: 1. Shopping and checkout on Sapphire Mall only require an EVM wallet (e.g. MetaMask).
rewards.walletNoticeLine2: 2. For on-chain programs on Bags, connect a Solana wallet on bags.fm and approve prompts there.
rewards.walletNoticeLine3: 3. EVM and Solana sessions are independent and cannot replace each other. Skip Solana if you skip Bags-only activities.

campaignDetail.notFound: Campaign not found—it may have ended or the link is invalid.
campaignDetail.claimSuccess: Claim recorded (demo). Head to the marketplace to use your perk.

walletHints.evm: This campaign requires an EVM wallet (e.g. MetaMask) on Sapphire Mall.
walletHints.solana: Join on Bags with a Solana wallet—separate from your EVM session on the mall.
walletHints.evm_optional: Connect an EVM wallet to track task progress; some node tasks can be previewed without it.

newbie-wallet.title: First wallet connection perk
newbie-wallet.desc: New users who connect an EVM wallet and pass verification receive a 10 USDT first-order voucher.
rules: For new Sapphire Mall accounts only; one claim per user.
Requires an EVM wallet and identity verification.
Voucher expires 7 days after claim and is non-transferable.
steps: Connect MetaMask or another EVM wallet and sign in.
Complete identity verification in account settings.
Return here to claim, then apply the voucher at checkout.

sap-pay-bonus.title: SAP checkout bonus
sap-pay-bonus.desc: Pay with SAP for extra fee rebates and spend-back rewards during the promo window.
rules: Only orders paid with SAP during the campaign count.
Rebates are paid in SAP; rates shown at checkout apply.
Wash trading or abuse voids eligibility.
steps: Hold enough SAP in your connected wallet.
Shop on the marketplace and choose SAP at payment.
Rebates appear instantly in this demo; production uses backend settlement.

referral.title: Sapphire referral partner
referral.desc: Invite friends to complete their first trade—earn 20% of their lifetime trading fees.
rules: Invitees must register via your link and complete a qualifying first trade.
Commission rate is fixed at 20% per settlement cycle.
Self-referrals and fraud are prohibited.
steps: Get your referral link from the help center.
Share it and guide friends through signup.
Commissions accrue after their first trade (demo).

node-mining.title: Contribution mining
node-mining.desc: Complete daily sharing and review tasks to grow contribution tiers and unlock fee discounts.
rules: Daily caps apply; duplicate spam does not count.
Contribution points apply only to this program—not a global wallet.
Tier benefits activate next settlement cycle.
steps: Open DAO / community tasks for today's quests.
Finish sharing, reviews, or listed interactions.
Check your tier and fee discount details.

dao-may.title: May governance vote
dao-may.desc: Vote on next-quarter virtual goods categories. Participants share a 5,000 SAP reward pool.
rules: Valid governance weight required; see DAO page for thresholds.
One vote per address per proposal.
Rewards ship within 7 business days after close (demo).
steps: Connect an EVM wallet and open DAO governance.
Read the proposal and pick an option.
Submit your vote per the DAO flow.

bags-blindbox.title: Bags collab mystery box on Solana
bags-blindbox.desc: Connect a Solana wallet on Bags to claim your Web3 blind box—badges and shop vouchers inside.
rules: Runs on Bags only; Solana wallet required.
Box contents and rarity are shown on Bags.
Sapphire Mall never custodies Solana keys or assets.
steps: Tap Open on Bags to visit bags.fm.
Connect Solana and approve prompts.
View claimed boxes in your Bags account.

bags-creator.title: Bags creator week: NFT mint
bags-creator.desc: Launch your art project on Bags with traffic support and secondary liquidity narratives from Sapphire Mall.
rules: Creators must mint through Bags workflows.
Submissions must meet content guidelines.
Promo slots are limited and subject to review.
steps: Create a creator profile on Bags with Solana connected.
Upload work and mint your NFT.
Submit the support application on Bags.

summer-preview.title: Summer ecosystem teaser
summer-preview.desc: Multi-chain creators meet Bags Launch—details drop before go-live.
rules: Teaser only—claims not open yet.
Full rules update when the campaign goes live.
Watch official announcements for the start time.
steps: Bookmark this page or subscribe to alerts (demo).
Return when live for full rules.
Join on Bags following the published flow.

staking-preview.title: Exchange & staking preview week
staking-preview.desc: Preview exchange flows and task systems—complete the survey for an early badge raffle.
rules: Survey and docs only during teaser; staking ships later.
Early badges are limited and raffled.
EVM wallet required to submit the survey.
steps: Visit Exchange to learn the SAP swap flow.
Connect wallet and finish the preview survey.
Wait for go-live to claim badges.

spring-ended.title: Spring Bags airdrop (closed)
spring-ended.desc: Thanks for participating—watch this page for the next season.
rules: Campaign closed; no new entries.
Past claims remain visible on Bags.
Next season will be announced separately.
steps: No action needed—event is over.
Check Bags for historical claims.
Follow this hub for upcoming campaigns.

rewards.futureDesc: Automated task claims and reward summaries are in development. Keep contributing via DAO votes and community quests—points will reconcile when the modules launch.
rewards.featureLeaderboardDesc: Highlight top contributors with bonus drops
rewards.subscribeDesc: Leave your email for campaign and airdrop alerts (demo).
rewards.subscribeToast: Subscriptions are coming soon—thanks for your interest.
rewards.heroHint: Connect an EVM wallet for on-site campaigns. Bags partners require Solana on bags.fm — the two are separate.
rewards.myActivityEmpty: Claimed campaigns appear here (local demo only).
